## Scenario

Describe the Rekordbox XML situation this fixture should represent.

## Why it matters

Explain what user confusion or safety risk this would cover.

## Expected report behavior

Describe how `djlib-doctor` should classify or report it.

## Privacy

- [ ] This can be represented with synthetic metadata.
- [ ] No real user music files are needed.
- [ ] No private Rekordbox export is attached.
